title: CSS3 Essentials: Styling That Scales
summary: Enhance UI aesthetics with modern CSS3 features emphasizing responsiveness, layouts, and maintainability.
personalizationNote: Target practical layout and styling skills to support Sudarshan's frontend apps alongside React usage.
videoStyle: Side-by-side code and live rendered UI with animations
learningObjectives: Use Flexbox and Grid for responsive layouts
knowledgeChecks: Which CSS layout module best handles vertical centering?
How do CSS variables improve maintainability?
narrationScript:
Scene 1: Modern Layout Techniques
Flexbox allows aligning items horizontally or vertically, great for components like navbars. Grid controls rows and columns, perfect for entire page layouts.

Scene 2: CSS Variables and Theming
Variables are reusable values like colors or spacing. Define them at the root for site-wide use, or inside components for scoped custom themes.

Scene 3: Transitions and Animation Principles
Transitions animate property changes like color or size. Keyframes define more complex sequences. Always test on devices to keep interactions smooth.

slides.title: Modern Layout Techniques
slides.speakerNotes: We'll explore Flexbox for one-dimensional layouts and Grid for two-dimensional ones. Knowing when and how to use each optimizes UI structure.
slides.narration: Flexbox allows aligning items horizontally or vertically, great for components like navbars. Grid controls rows and columns, perfect for entire page layouts.
slides.visualCue: Animated flex container and grid example side by side.

slides.title: CSS Variables and Theming
slides.speakerNotes: CSS variables simplify theming and reusability. Learn to define and override them effectively for dynamic styles.
slides.narration: Variables are reusable values like colors or spacing. Define them at the root for site-wide use, or inside components for scoped custom themes.
slides.visualCue: Theme toggle example switching CSS variable values live.

slides.title: Transitions and Animation Principles
slides.speakerNotes: Animations draw user attention but must be performant. We'll cover how to create smooth, efficient UI effects.
slides.narration: Transitions animate property changes like color or size. Keyframes define more complex sequences. Always test on devices to keep interactions smooth.
slides.visualCue: Button hover transition and a simple animation cycle illustration.
